channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: VgScript - Sun Jun 28 13:10:37 UTC 2026
item.description:
Language support for VgScript (*.vgs) — a bracket-tagged scene DSL for narrative scripts: scenes, dialogue, named actions, timed/parallel events, and branching...
vendor: Noümen Interactive downloads: 12 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.guillemsrr.vgscript

item.title: LSP Senior - Mon Jun 29 22:58:42 UTC 2026
item.description:
Support for the Senior Programming Language (LSP): syntax highlighting, bracket matching, auto-close, code folding and snippets for .lsp and .lspt files.
vendor: Bruno Bender downloads: 11 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.lspsenior

item.title: HTTP Client Companion - Mon Jun 29 12:20:24 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Anton Shuvaev downloads: 1 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: com.httpclientcompanion

item.title: GoPrism - Sat Jun 27 23:54:37 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Open in Obsidian - Mon Jun 29 14:08:18 UTC 2026
item.description:
